title: rubus × pseudotimendus
intro: Rubus × pseudotimendus, also known as the pseudotimendus raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The pseudotimendus raspberry is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudotimendus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves, stems, and roots can be used in various herbal preparations, including salves and ointments for topical applications.
